creator: pav@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: feedback->open

Submitter replied: 

I am sorry that I have not tested all these 16 ports. 
For the safety I think it is better to create a new port 
of hdf5-18 or something like and preserve the old version. 

But when I discussed it with the hdf5 maintainer, he  
think there is no need to do like this, and update the  
old version to the new version is better. So I submmit 
this PR.
